full_text:
Lady Dong 董夫人
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Lady Dong (董夫人). Arrested and executed due to her father’s plots against Cao Cao despite being pregnant. Lady Dong was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Lady Dong lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
